# Dean Designers — Create Clothing Design

> Professional custom streetwear clothing design and logo brand identity studio at createclothingdesign.com

## About
Dean Designers (createclothingdesign.com) is a professional design service studio specializing in custom streetwear clothing design, t-shirt graphics, hoodie design, and logo brand identity. Active since 2018 with 1,000+ completed projects for clients from 25+ countries. Rated 5.0 stars.

This is NOT a print-on-demand platform. Dean Designers provides original custom artwork created by a human designer — production-ready source files (PSD, AI, PNG) that clients own and can print with any manufacturer.

## Services

### Clothing & Streetwear Design
Custom streetwear graphics for t-shirts, hoodies, jackets, and full apparel collections.
- Basic: $50/concept — single-side design, source file, print-ready
- Standard: $75/concept — front & back, mockup, commercial use (most popular)
- Premium: $120/concept — complete system with techpack, unlimited revisions

### Logo & Brand Identity
Professional logo design with vector files, mockups, and brand identity systems.
- Basic: $80/concept — logo, vector, printable files
- Standard: $150/concept — plus 3D mockup and source file
- Premium: $200/concept — full brand identity with social media kit
